---
applyTo: '**/*.js'
---
# JavaScript File Instructions
- try to keep the code modular and split it into different files and classes where it makes sense.
- separate the GUI code from the logic code as much as possible.
- please use jsdoc for code documentation. use JSDoc tag for all functions and classes so its easy to understand later on.https://jsdoc.app/
- I usally use standardjs for code style, so please follow that: https://standardjs.com/
